mapper.select: /* reuseUsimMgmtMapper.getContractInfo */ SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM ,SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME ,FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', SUB.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM ,SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ,FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007', REQ.ON_OFF_TYPE) AS ON_OFF_TYPE_NM ,REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM ,REQ.OPER_TYPE_NM /*업무구분 */ ,SUB.ICC_ID ,REQ.FST_USIM_NO ,REQ.LST_RATE_CD ,SUB.SUB_STATUS FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_REQUEST_DTL REQ WHERE SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchVal} AND ROWNUM = 1
